DROP TABLE IF EXISTS series1; CREATE TABLE series1(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO series1(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, 5.6, -4.4),(2, -9.6, 3),(3, -1.3, -4),(4, 5.3, 9.7);
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) FROM series1;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS series2; CREATE TABLE series2(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO series2(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, 0, 0),(2, 1, 1),(3, 2, 2),(4, 3, 3);
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) FROM series2;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS series3; CREATE TABLE series3(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO series3(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, NULL, NULL),(2, 2, 2),(3, 3, 3);
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) FROM series3;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS series4; CREATE TABLE series4(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO series4(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, 1, 2),(2, 2, 3),(3, 3, 4),(4, 4, 5),(5, 5, 6);
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) AS covariance FROM series4 WHERE x_value > 0;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS series5; CREATE TABLE series5(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO series5(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, -5.5, 3.2),(2, 0, 0),(3, 2.1, -4.3),(4, NULL, NULL),(5, -1.0, 1.0);
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) AS covariance FROM series5 WHERE x_value IS NOT NULL;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS series6; CREATE TABLE series6(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO series6(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, 3.5, NULL),(2, 2.4, 3.6),(3, 4.2, 1.2),(4, 0.0, 5.5);
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) FROM series6 WHERE y_value IS NOT NULL;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS series7; CREATE TABLE series7(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO series7(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, 10, 20),(2, 20, 40),(3, 30, 60),(4, 40, 80);
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) FROM series7;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS series8; CREATE TABLE series8(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO series8(i, x_value, y_value) SELECT i, x_value, y_value FROM series4 UNION ALL SELECT i, x_value + 1, y_value + 1 FROM series5;
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) FROM series8;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS series9; CREATE TABLE series9(i UInt32, x_value Float64, y_value Float64) ENGINE = Memory; INSERT INTO series9(i, x_value, y_value) VALUES (1, -1e+6, 1e+6),(2, 0, 0),(3, 1e+6, -1e+6);
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) FROM series9;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS combined_series; CREATE TABLE combined_series AS SELECT * FROM series1 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM series2;
SELECT covarPop(x_value, y_value) FROM combined_series;
